title: Exit
description: Exit: Used to instruct the adapter to exit the software. The adapter will generally not be useable after running this command as the link to the software will be broken.

SaveBeforeClose.description: If set to true, the adapter attempts to save any open file, closes the file and exits the software.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
